headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -104.4)
key_insights: Fears trending up 126% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 143 quotes and an outsized 108 at strong intensity, driving the score to 82.0 — people are venting loudly today.
• This sits in the upper half of the 183-day range (−0.5 to 171.4), reflecting a notably elevated but not unprecedented level of anger.
• Fears rebounded sharply from yesterday's −28.7 to 6.5, while Optimism edged up but remains in negative territory, suggesting mood is improving slightly outside of the frustration spike.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
